summary: Phase 2 Incident Tickets - Structured Variance Resolution Workflow: All features tested and working. 17/17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with Playwright.

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warnings: <th>/<td> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>/<tr> - caused by dynamic rendering in items.map()
console_warnings.note: Does not affect functionality - carried over from previous iteration. Consider using React.Fragment instead of span for mapping table elements.

console_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent
console_warnings.note: Accessibility warning - does not affect functionality

test_categories: Validation: note required, invalid type rejected
Sender confirm with matching qty auto-resolves
Sender confirm with non-matching qty doesn't auto-resolve
Existing closed tickets work without resolution_type

incident_tickets_page_loads.details: Page loads with summary cards, main tabs (Incident Tickets, All Transfer Variances), status sub-tabs

summary_cards_display.details: Shows Total Variances (8), Capital Loss (₱6,670.00), Active Tickets (1), Resolved (5), Unresolved Loss (₱1,050.00)

resolution_column_in_table.details: Table headers include RESOLUTION column: ['Ticket', 'Transfer', 'Route', 'Capital Loss', 'Resolution', 'Status', 'Assigned', 'Date']

details.warning_text: Transit loss will charge the accountable party (driver/courier) below.
details.info_text: Sender error means no actual loss occurred. The sender miscounted the original shipment.

details.placeholder: e.g. Driver Juan, LBC Express, JRS Courier...

resolve_button_validation.details: Resolve button disabled when required fields missing (no type, no note, no accountable party for transit_loss)

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings persist in items table mapping - consider using React.Fragment (<></>) instead of <span> for wrapping dynamic table rows
Resolution column shows '—' for legacy closed tickets without resolution_type - this is expected behavior
seed_data_creation: Created test incident tickets via transfer flow during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Incident Tickets implemented and tested. Key test IDs: incident-tickets-page, tickets-main-tab, variances-main-tab, resolve-btn, sender-confirm-btn, resolution-type-select, accountable-party-input, recovery-amount-input, resolve-note-input, confirm-resolve-btn. Resolution types: transit_loss, sender_error, receiver_error, write_off, insurance_claim, partial_recovery. Note: The Sender Confirm button only appears for open/investigating tickets that haven't been sender-confirmed yet. Accountable Party field is conditional - shown for transit_loss, insurance_claim, partial_recovery only.
